reason: The preregistered Monday x Asia factorial found no positive cost-robust calendar baseline. A bounded session decomposition is required to distinguish the known positive London contribution from the negative Asia and New York contributions without declaring a London-only baseline post hoc.

continuation.if_session_arm_passes: rerun the six fixed context candidates and five one-at-a-time event policies on that frozen session baseline
continuation.if_no_session_arm_passes: stop USA500 optimization of this core and classify no viable proxy baseline
